chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Crl. Rev. Application No. 05 of 2024 Crl. Rev. Application No. 51 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES 1. For order on MA No. 11953/2024 (urgent) 2. For order on MA No. 11954/2024 (withdrawal of case) 25.09.2024 Muhammad Khan, Applicant in person Syed Shahlal Haider, Respondent No.2 in person Ms. Rubina Qadir, Deputy Prosecutor General Sindh.-.-.-.-.-. 1. Urgency granted. 2. Muhammad Khan has appeared in person along with Syed Shahlal Haider. Muhammad Khan is not represented by any counsel he has filed an affidavit of forgiveness signed by Syed Shahlal Haider alongwith photocopy of his CNIC. Syed Shahlal Haider in person confirms that he has forgiven Muhammad Khan. As the applicant had appeared in person and although the affidavit of forgiveness is badly drafted I am treating it as an application under Section 345 Cr.P.C. let the office number it as such. The offence under Section 489-F PPC is compoundable. Accordingly, Muhammad Khan stands acquitted under section 345 Cr.P.C. Since the parties have reached a settlement and have no grievance against each other both Criminal Revision Applications are disposed of accordingly. JUDGE Amjad PS

Since the parties have reached a settlement and have no grievance against each other both Criminal Revision Applications are disposed of accordingly. JUDGE Amjad PS ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Crl. Rev. Application No. 295 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES For hearing of main case 25.09.2024 Mr. Ravi Pinjwani Advocate for the Applicant Ms. Rubina Khan, Deputy Prosecutor General Sindh.-.-.-.-.-. Let notice on Yousuf M. Gill (Respondent No.2) be issued on his address Secretariat H-38, Sector 39, Gulshan-e-Sikandar, Korangi, Karachi through the SHO within whose jurisdiction he resides. The SHO concerned shall serve the notice and if Yousuf M. Gill is not present there in his address he shall record statement of the representative of Church Mission Trust Association and file the same in Court. SHO shall do this exercise and report compliance within one week’s time. Relist on 08.10.2024. JUDGE Amjad PS

Relist on 08.10.2024. JUDGE Amjad PS ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Crl. Misc. Application No. 895 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES 1. For order on Office objection at A 2. For hearing of main case 25.09.2024 Mr. Samsam Ali Khan Advocate for the Applicant Ms. Amna Ansari, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh SIP Abid Hussain of PS. Docks.-.-.-.-.-. Ms. Lubna A. Abbasi files vakalatnama on behalf of proposed accused and seeks a copy of the application and some time to prepare. Learned counsel for the Applicant will provide her a copy during course of the day. Relist on 02.10.2024. JUDGE Amjad PS

Relist on 02.10.2024. JUDGE Amjad PS ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. S-1014 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES Hearing of Cases 1. For order on Office objection 2. For hearing of main case 25.09.2024 Mr. Muhammad Aqil Zaidi Advocate for the Petitioner Ms. Amna Ansari, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh SDPO Ali Hassan SIP Nazeer Ahmed of P.S. Tamoria.-.-.-.-.-. Learned counsel for the Petitioner under instructions does not press this petition. I have shown immense judicial restraint in not imposing cost as it appears to be totally frivolous petition. Dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE Amjad PS

Dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE Amjad PS ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. S-1058 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES D/o matter 1. For order on Office objection No. 1 and 5 2. For hearing of main case 25.09.2024 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Khan Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Imran Ahmed Khan Abro, Assistant Advocate General Sindh.-.-.-.-.-. Learned counsel for the Petitioner submits that he has reconsidered the case and is of the view that he would not press this petition and would approach the Guardian & Wards Court in the first instance. Order accordingly. JUDGE Amjad PS

Order accordingly. JUDGE Amjad PS ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. S-627 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES D/o matter 1. For order on CMA No. 8482/2024 (Urgent) 2. For order on CMA No. 6650/2024 (Contempt) 25.09.2024 Mr. Aijaz Hussain Soomro Advocate for the Petitioner SIP Nazeer Ahmed P.S. Taimuria.-.-.-.-.-. 1. Urgency allowed. 2. Learned counsel has explained that in spite of the Order dated 12.06.2024 the husband of the Petitioner has completely declined to arrange a meeting of her little son Kabeer Hussain (aged 13 years) with her. Keeping a minor away from mother is totally un-expectable. Let notice be issued to Khalid Hussain, the Respondent No.1 to be present along with minor on the next date of hearing. The notice should be served through the SHO within whose jurisdiction the Respondent No.1 resides who will ensure that Respondent No.1 is present in Court with minor. Relist on 02.10.2024. JUDGE Amjad PS

Relist on 02.10.2024. JUDGE Amjad PS ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. S-975 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES 1. For order on office objection and reply 2.For hearing of Main Case 25.09.2024 Mr. Ali Gohar Masroof Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Muhammad Ahmed Assistant Attorney General SIP Nazeer Ahmed P.S. Taimuria.-.-.-.-.-. Syed Muhammad Abdul Kabir files vakalatnama on behalf of the Respondent No.1 which is taken on record. Learned counsel for the Petitioner submits that he will be satisfied if the official Respondents act in accordance with law and do not become party to any dispute between the Irfan Iqbal and Abdul Ghaffar Bhundi. Mr. Muhammad Ahmed, Assistant Attorney General represents that police officials shall act all times in accordance with law. Petition stands disposed of. JUDGE Amjad PS

Petition stands disposed of. JUDGE Amjad PS ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. S-1031 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES 1. For order on office objection 2.For hearing of Main Case 25.09.2024 Mr. Muhammad Ismail Meo Advocate along with Petitioner Fida Hussain SIP Nawaz Addl. SHO P.S. Sachal Ms. Rubina Qadir, DPG for the State.-.-.-.-.-. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Meo Advoate files vakalatnama on behalf of the Petitioner which is taken on record. The issue appears to be that there is a minor Um-i-Habibi who because of certain events is in custody of a man called Abdul Hafeez Shoro who is not a blood relative. The child cannot be found because it has been reported that said Abdul Hafeez Shoro has shifted to Mirpurkhas. Police official present in Court is absolutely of no help. DIG Mirpurkhas and DIG Karachi East both are requested to pass the necessary instructions to their colleagues to ensure that the child is recovered and produced in this Court on the next date of hearing. Let a copy of this order be sent to the DIG Mirpurkhas and DIG Karachi East through WhatsApp and Bailiff latest by tomorrow. Relist on 01.10.2024. JUDGE Amjad PS

Relist on 01.10.2024. JUDGE Amjad PS ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Cr. Misc. Application No. 372 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES Disposed of matter 1. For order on MA No. 12612/2024 (Urgent) 2. For order on MA No. 12465/2024 25.09.2024 Mr. Moin Sandheelo Advocate holds brief for Malik Altaf Hussain Advocate for the Applicant.-.-.-.-.-. 1. Urgency granted. 2. Notice. To come up on 03.10.2024. Learned counsel has filed a copy of NBW under cover of statement which is taken on record. He has assured the Court that Aijaz-ul-Hassan will be present in Court on the next date of hearing which is 19.10.2024. On this representation being made the operation of NBW is suspended till 19.10.2024. If on 19.10.2024 Aijaz-ul-Hassan is not present before the learned XIth Civil & Family Judge, Karachi East, fresh NBWs will be issued against him for which no relief will be given. JUDGE Amjad PS

If on 19.10.2024 Aijaz-ul-Hassan is not present before the learned XIth Civil & Family Judge, Karachi East, fresh NBWs will be issued against him for which no relief will be given. JUDGE Amjad PS ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. S-1033 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES 1. For order on office objection 2.For hearing of Main Case 25.09.2024 Mr. Raza Hussain Shar Advocate for the Petitioner Ms. Rubina Qadir, DPG for the State.-.-.-.-.-. Heard learned counsel for the Petitioner and DPG for the State. Police officials shall act in accordance with law. Petition stands disposed of. JUDGE Amjad PS

Petition stands disposed of. JUDGE Amjad PS ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Cr. Appeal No. 578 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES For hearing of Main Case 25.09.2024 Mr. Muhammad Ilyas Awan Advocate for the Applicant Mr. Ubaidullah Abro, Advocate for SBCA Ms. Rubina Qadir, DPG for the State.-.-.-.-.-. Paper book has not yet been prepared. Relist after four weeks. JUDGE Amjad PS

Relist after four weeks. JUDGE Amjad PS ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Cr. Misc. Application No. 846 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES 1. For order on office objection at A 2. For hearing of main case 3. For hearing of MA No. 12983/2023 25.09.2024 Mr. Ghulam Rasool Korai Advocate for the Applicant Mr. Daniyal Shaikh Advocate for the Respondent No.5 and 6 Ms. Rubina Qadir, Deputy Prosecutor General.-.-.-.-.-. Heard. Reserved for orders. JUDGE Amjad PS

Reserved for orders. JUDGE Amjad PS ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. S-1118 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES 1. For order on CMA No. 8503/2024 (urgent) 2. For order on office objection No.20 and reply of counsel as at A 3. 1. For order on CMA No. 8504/2024 (Exemption) 4. For order on CMA No. 8505/2024 (Rule Nisi) 5.For hearing of Main Case 25.09.2024 Mr. Zakir Hussain Khaskheli Advocate along with Petitioner.-.-.-.-.-. 1. Urgency granted. 2. Deferred. 3. Granted subject to all just exceptions. 4-5. The grievance of the Petitioner is that his wife Naima has been kidnapped by some people whose names he has listed from Serial No.1 to 11 in this petition. He has written an application to the SHO Police Station Ajmer Nagri, Karachi which is at page-31 of the file. SHO Police Station Ajmer Nagri shall look into this case if he feels in his opinion that a cognizable offence is made out he shall act in accordance with law. Petition stands disposed of. JUDGE Amjad PS

Petition stands disposed of. JUDGE Amjad PS ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Cr. Bail Application No. 2165 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES Hearing of Bail Application 1. For Orders on MA No. 12558/2024 (Urgent) 2. For Orders on MA No. 12559/2024 (Exemption) 3. For hearing of Bail Application 25.09.2024 Mr. Muhammad Riaz Abbasi Advocate for the Applicant.-.-.-.-.-. 1. Urgency granted. 2. Exemption granted subject to all just exceptions. 3. Notice to the Complainant as well as Prosecutor General Sindh. Relist on 10.10.2024. JUDGE Amjad PS

Relist on 10.10.2024. JUDGE Amjad PS ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Cr. Bail Application No. 2129 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES Hearing of Bail Application 1. For Orders on MA No. 12335/2024 (Urgent) 2. For Orders on MA No. 12336/2024 (Exemption) 3. For hearing of Bail Application 25.09.2024 Mr. Muhammad Umer Panhwar Advocate for the Applicant.-.-.-.-.-. 1. Urgency granted. 2. Exemption granted subject to all just exceptions. 3. Notice to the Prosecutor General Sindh. Relist on 09.10.2024. JUDGE Amjad PS

Relist on 09.10.2024. JUDGE Amjad PS ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Cr. Bail Application No. 1926 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES For hearing of Bail Application 25.09.2024 Mr. Sultan Ahmed Advocate for the Applicant Ms. Rubina Qadir, Deputy Prosecutor General.-.-.-.-.-. Syed Amir Shah Advocate files vakalatnama on behalf of the Complainant which is taken on record. Arguments Heard. For the reasons to be recorded later on bail application is dismissed. JUDGE Amjad PS

For the reasons to be recorded later on bail application is dismissed. JUDGE Amjad PS ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Cr. Bail Application No. 1921 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES For hearing of Bail Application 25.09.2024 Mr. Muhammad Imran Advocate holds brief for Mr. Shakeel Ahmed Advocate for the Applicant Mr. Saleem Akhter Buriro, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh.-.-.-.-.-. Mr. Ahmed Ali Gabol Advocate files vakalatnama on behalf of the Complainant which is taken on record. Learned counsel for the Applicant seeks adjournment. Relist on 24.10.2024. JUDGE Amjad PS

Relist on 24.10.2024. JUDGE Amjad PS ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Cr. Bail Application No. 1913 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES For hearing of Bail Application 25.09.2024 Mr. Nadeem Ali Advocate holds brief for Ms. Safia Qadir Advocate for the Applicant Mr. Saleem Akhter Buriro, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh.-.-.-.-.-. Mr. Ishfaq Ahmed Buriro Advocate files vakalatnama on behalf of the Complainant which is taken on record. Request for adjournment is made on behalf of learned counsel for the Applicant. Granted. Relist on 23.10.2024. JUDGE Amjad PS

Relist on 23.10.2024. JUDGE Amjad PS ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Cr. Bail Application No. 1855 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES For hearing of Bail Application 25.09.2024 Mr. Abdul Qadir Khaskheli Advocate for the Applicant Mr. Muhammad Ilyas Khan Tanoli Advocate for the Respondent Mr. Saleem Akhter Buriro, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh.-.-.-.-.-. Learned counsel for the Applicant seeks time to prepare. Relist on 16.10.2024. JUDGE Amjad PS

Relist on 16.10.2024. JUDGE Amjad PS ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Cr. Bail Application No. 1831 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES For hearing of Bail Application 25.09.2024 Mr. Aqeel Hassan Advocate for the Applicant Muhammad Danish Khan Complainant present in person Mr. Saleem Akhter Buriro, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh SIP Amjad Ali of P.S. Orangi Town SIP Muhammad Tariq P.S. Orangi Town.-.-.-.-.-. Muhammad Danish complainant is present seeks some time to engage a counsel. Four days’ time is granted. Relist on 02.10.2024. JUDGE Amjad PS
